451.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to say in his bowing and prostration: "Subbuhun Quddusun, Rabb al-Mala'ikati wa al-Ruh (Perfect, Holy, Lord of the Angels and the Spirit)."
451.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mengucapkan dalam ruku dan sujudnya: "Subbuhun Quddusun, Rabbul Mala'ikati war Ruh (Maha Suci, Maha Kudus, Rabb para malaikat dan Ruh)."

452.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "A month would pass over the family of Muhammad without them baking bread or cooking in a pot."
452.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Satu bulan berlalu atas keluarga Muhammad tanpa mereka memanggang roti atau memasak dalam periuk."

453.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when a man visited her, the face of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ changed as if it was difficult for him. She said: "O Messenger of Allah, he is my foster-brother." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Be careful of who your foster-brothers are, for fosterage is established only by hunger."
453.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika seorang laki-laki mengunjunginya, wajah Rasulullah ﷺ berubah seolah-olah hal itu menyulitkan beliau. Ia berkata: "Wahai Rasulullah, dia adalah saudara sesusuanku." Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Perhatikanlah siapa saudara sesusuan kalian, karena sesungguhnya susuan itu hanya ditetapkan karena lapar."

454.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when asked whether a woman who is menstruating needs to make up her prayers, she said: "Are you a Haruriyyah? We used to menstruate in the time of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and we did not do that."
454.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ditanya apakah wanita yang haid harus mengqadha shalatnya, ia berkata: "Apakah kamu seorang Haruriyyah? Kami dahulu haid di masa Rasulullah ﷺ dan kami tidak melakukan itu."

455.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "One who is proficient in reciting the Quran will be with the noble and righteous scribes. And the one who recites the Quran and finds it difficult will have two rewards."
455.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Orang yang mahir dalam membaca Al-Quran akan bersama para utusan yang mulia dan berbakti. Dan orang yang membaca Al-Quran dan merasa kesulitan akan mendapat dua pahala."

456.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I wished I had asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ for permission as Sawdah had asked, so he would have permitted me to depart from Muzdalifah before standing."
456.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Seandainya aku meminta izin kepada Rasulullah ﷺ seperti yang dilakukan Saudah, niscaya beliau mengizinkanku untuk bertolak dari Muzdalifah sebelum wukuf."

457.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prayed any prayer, he would keep it regularly. When he missed his night prayers due to sleep overcoming him or due to illness, he would pray twelve rak'ahs during the day. She also said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ never stood in prayer a whole night until morning, nor read the Quran in a single night completely, nor fasted a complete month other than Ramadan until he died."
457.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Rasulullah ﷺ melaksanakan suatu shalat, beliau selalu menjaganya. Ketika beliau ketinggalan shalat malamnya karena tertidur atau karena sakit, beliau akan shalat dua belas rakaat di siang hari. Ia juga berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah berdiri shalat semalam penuh hingga subuh, tidak pernah membaca Al-Quran dalam satu malam secara lengkap, dan tidak pernah berpuasa penuh satu bulan selain Ramadan hingga beliau wafat."

458.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "O son of my sister, Abu Abd al-Rahman — meaning Ibn Umar — made an error in what he heard. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ mentioned a man being punished in his grave because of his deeds while his family were weeping over him. By Allah, the carrier of no burden bears the burden of another."
458.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Wahai putra saudariku, Abu Abdurrahman — yaitu Ibnu Umar — keliru dalam apa yang ia dengar. Rasulullah ﷺ menyebutkan seorang laki-laki yang diazab di kuburnya karena perbuatannya sementara keluarganya menangisinya. Demi Allah, tidaklah seseorang menanggung dosa orang lain."

459.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray the forenoon prayer — four rak'ahs — and he would add to them as much as Allah the Almighty willed."
459.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ biasa melaksanakan shalat Dhuha — empat rakaat — dan beliau menambah lebih banyak sesuai kehendak Allah Yang Maha Mulia."

460.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "Instruct your husbands to wash off the traces of excrement and urine, for I am too shy to forbid them directly. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to do this."
460.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Perintahkan suami-suami kalian untuk membasuh bekas kotoran dan air kencing, karena aku malu melarang mereka secara langsung. Rasulullah ﷺ biasa melakukannya."

461.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that on a day that was not her turn, she spread a garment dyed with saffron with water to release its fragrance and sat beside the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He said: "Step away, O Aisha — this is not your day." She said: "That is the grace of Allah which He bestows upon whom He wills." She then told him what she had done, and he was pleased with her.
461.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa pada hari yang bukan gilirannya, ia memercikkan air pada pakaian yang diwarnai dengan za'faran agar wanginya keluar dan duduk di samping Rasulullah ﷺ. Beliau bersabda: "Menjauhlah, wahai Aisyah — ini bukan harimu." Ia berkata: "Itu adalah karunia Allah yang Dia berikan kepada siapa yang Dia kehendaki." Ia kemudian menceritakan apa yang telah ia lakukan, dan beliau pun ridha kepadanya.

462.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she confirmed which recitation of a certain Quranic verse the Messenger of Allah ﷺ had used, and testified: "I bear witness that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to recite it thus, and thus was it revealed."
462.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia mengkonfirmasi bacaan mana dari suatu ayat Al-Quran yang digunakan Rasulullah ﷺ, dan bersaksi: "Aku bersaksi bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa membacanya demikian, dan demikianlah ia diturunkan."

463.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to pray while she was lying across in front of him — to his right and to his left.
463.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa shalat sementara ia berbaring melintang di depannya — di sebelah kanan dan kiri beliau.

464.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the Messenger of Allah ﷺ urinated, Umar stood behind him with a vessel of water. The Prophet ﷺ asked: "What is this, O Umar?" He said: "Water for you to perform ablution with, O Messenger of Allah." He said: "I have not been commanded to perform ablution every time I urinate. Were I to do that, it would become a Sunnah."
464.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Rasulullah ﷺ buang air kecil, Umar berdiri di belakangnya dengan membawa kendi air. Nabi ﷺ bertanya: "Apa ini, wahai Umar?" Ia berkata: "Air untuk berwudhu, wahai Rasulullah." Beliau bersabda: "Aku tidak diperintahkan untuk berwudhu setiap kali buang air kecil. Seandainya aku melakukannya, hal itu akan menjadi Sunnah."

465.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "One or two sucks do not constitute a prohibition."
465.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Satu atau dua kali isapan tidak menjadikan larangan (mahram)."

466.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "By Allah, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ never abandoned the two rak'ahs after 'Asr in my presence, not even once."
466.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Demi Allah, Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah meninggalkan dua rakaat setelah Ashar di hadapanku, tidak sekali pun."

467.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ came to her while a young girl was on her lap. He gave her his lower garment and said: "Divide it between this girl and the girl in the lap of Umm Salamah, for I think she has reached puberty."
467.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ datang kepadanya sementara ada seorang gadis kecil di pahanya. Beliau memberikan kain bawahnya dan bersabda: "Bagilah antara gadis ini dan gadis yang ada di pangkuan Ummu Salamah, karena aku mengira ia sudah mencapai masa pubertas."

468.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the Prophet ﷺ was ill, she and others suggested that someone else lead the people in prayer, fearing people would weep at the sight of him. He repeatedly said: "Tell Abu Bakr to lead the people in prayer." The third time he said: "Leave me. You are like the companions of Yusuf. Let Abu Bakr lead the people in prayer."
468.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Nabi ﷺ sakit, ia dan yang lain menyarankan agar orang lain yang memimpin shalat, karena khawatir orang-orang akan menangis melihatnya. Beliau berulang kali berkata: "Perintahkan Abu Bakar untuk memimpin shalat orang-orang." Pada kali ketiga beliau berkata: "Biarkan aku. Kalian seperti para sahabat Yusuf. Biarkan Abu Bakar yang memimpin shalat orang-orang."

469.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ wanted to perform the ritual bath after sexual intercourse, he would wash his hands three times, then pour water with his right hand onto his left hand and wash his private part until he cleaned it. He would then wash his hands well, then rinse his mouth three times and sniff water three times, wash his face three times and his forearms three times. Then he would pour water over his head three times, then bathe. When he came out, he would wash his feet."
469.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ ingin mandi junub, beliau mencuci kedua tangannya tiga kali, kemudian menuangkan air dengan tangan kanannya ke tangan kirinya dan mencuci kemaluannya hingga bersih. Kemudian beliau mencuci tangannya dengan baik, lalu berkumur tiga kali dan menghirup air ke hidung tiga kali, mencuci wajahnya tiga kali dan kedua lengannya tiga kali. Kemudian beliau menuangkan air ke atas kepalanya tiga kali, lalu mandi. Ketika keluar, beliau mencuci kedua kakinya."

470.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade nabidh (fermented drink) made in earthenware jars.
470.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang nabidh (minuman fermentasi) yang dibuat dalam kendi tanah liat.

471.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the Prophet ﷺ was told that a spell had been placed on him using a comb and hair clippings in a palm tree at Dhi Arwan, he went there and returned, informing her. He likened the palm tree's fronds to the heads of devils and its water to henna water. She asked: "O Messenger of Allah, why did you not reveal it to the people?" He said: "Allah the Almighty has already cured me, and I feared stirring up trouble among the people."
471.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Nabi ﷺ diberitahu bahwa sihir telah diletakkan padanya menggunakan sisir dan potongan rambut dalam pohon kurma di Dzi Arwan, beliau pergi ke sana dan kembali, lalu memberitahunya. Beliau menyamakan pelepah pohon kurma itu dengan kepala-kepala setan dan airnya dengan air pacar. Ia bertanya: "Wahai Rasulullah, mengapa engkau tidak memberitahukannya kepada orang-orang?" Beliau bersabda: "Allah Yang Maha Mulia telah menyembuhkanku, dan aku khawatir menimbulkan kerusuhan di antara manusia."

472.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said regarding a man who divorced his wife three times and she then married another man who divorced her before consummating the marriage: "She cannot return to the first husband until she has tasted his sweetness and he has tasted her sweetness."
472.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda mengenai seorang laki-laki yang menceraikan istrinya tiga kali dan wanita itu kemudian menikah dengan laki-laki lain yang menceraikannya sebelum menggaulinya: "Ia tidak dapat kembali kepada suami pertama hingga ia merasakan manisnya dan suami kedua merasakan manisnya."

473.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was asked about al-bit' — a drink made from honey that the people of Yemen used to drink. He said: "Every intoxicating drink is forbidden."
473.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ditanya tentang al-bit' — minuman yang terbuat dari madu yang biasa diminum oleh penduduk Yaman. Beliau bersabda: "Setiap minuman yang memabukkan adalah haram."

474.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave his wives a choice — was that then a divorce?"
474.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ memberikan pilihan kepada istri-istrinya — apakah itu kemudian menjadi talak?"

475.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she recalled: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to us: 'Which of you will be the one at whom the dogs of al-Haw'ab will bark?' She said: I think I am that one. Al-Zubayr then said to her: 'Turn back — perhaps Allah the Almighty will set things right among the people through you.'"
475.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia mengenang: "Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda kepada kami: 'Siapakah di antara kalian yang akan digonggongi oleh anjing-anjing al-Haw'ab?' Ia berkata: Aku mengira itu adalah aku. Al-Zubayr kemudian berkata kepadanya: 'Kembalilah — semoga Allah Yang Maha Mulia mendamaikan manusia melaluimu.'"

476.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when a man said he felt shy asking her a question, she replied: "Ask and do not be shy, for I am your mother." He asked about a man who has intercourse but does not ejaculate. She told him from the Prophet ﷺ: "If the two circumcised parts meet, then the ritual bath is obligatory."
476.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika seorang laki-laki mengatakan ia malu bertanya kepadanya, ia menjawab: "Tanyalah dan jangan malu, karena aku adalah ibumu." Ia bertanya tentang laki-laki yang berhubungan intim tetapi tidak mengeluarkan mani. Ia memberitahunya dari Nabi ﷺ: "Jika kedua khitan bertemu, maka mandi wajib."

477.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade us from al-hantam — which is earthenware jars — and al-dubba' and al-naqir and al-muzaffat."
477.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ melarang kami dari al-hantam — yaitu kendi tanah liat — dan al-dubba', al-naqir, dan al-muzaffat."

478.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "There is no Muslim man over whom a community of people pray, all of them interceding for him, except that their intercession is accepted for him."
478.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Tidak ada seorang muslim yang dishalati oleh sekelompok orang, semuanya mendoakannya, kecuali syafaat mereka diterima untuknya."

479.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the Messenger of Allah ﷺ grew older, he would pray six rak'ahs and then pray Witr as the seventh, and would pray two rak'ahs while seated. She also said: "He continued this until he died." She further narrated that when he asked about celibacy, she replied: "Have you not heard Allah the Almighty say: 'We sent messengers before you and appointed for them wives and children'? So do not remain celibate."
479.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Rasulullah ﷺ bertambah tua, beliau shalat enam rakaat kemudian shalat Witir sebagai yang ketujuh, dan shalat dua rakaat dalam keadaan duduk. Ia juga berkata: "Beliau terus demikian hingga wafat." Ia juga meriwayatkan bahwa ketika seseorang bertanya tentang membujang, ia menjawab: "Tidakkah kamu mendengar Allah Yang Maha Mulia berfirman: 'Sungguh Kami telah mengutus para rasul sebelummu dan Kami telah menjadikan untuk mereka istri-istri dan keturunan'? Maka janganlah membujang."

480.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I used to scrape it off the garment of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ with my hand. If you can see it, wash it; if it is hidden from you, sprinkle water on it."
480.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku biasa mengerok itu dari pakaian Rasulullah ﷺ dengan tanganku. Jika kamu dapat melihatnya, cucilah; jika tidak terlihat, percikkan air di atasnya."

481.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when a woman asked her whether a menstruating woman needs to make up her prayers, she said: "Are you a Haruriyyah? We used to menstruate in the time of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and we did not make up any of the prayers."
481.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika seorang wanita bertanya apakah wanita haid perlu mengqadha shalatnya, ia berkata: "Apakah kamu seorang Haruriyyah? Kami dahulu haid di masa Rasulullah ﷺ dan kami tidak mengqadha satu pun shalat."

482.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "Five animals are harmful and may be killed in both the sacred precincts and outside: the snake, the speckled crow, the rat, the vicious dog, and the kite."
482.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Lima hewan adalah hama dan boleh dibunuh baik di tanah haram maupun di luar: ular, gagak berbintik, tikus, anjing buas, dan elang."

483.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said regarding one who drinks from a silver vessel: "It is as if he is pouring Hellfire into his stomach."
483.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda mengenai orang yang minum dari bejana perak: "Seolah-olah ia menuangkan api neraka ke dalam perutnya."

484.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The grave has a squeezing, and if anyone were to be saved from it, Sa'd ibn Mu'adh would have been saved.'"
484.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya kubur memiliki tekanan, dan seandainya ada seseorang yang selamat darinya, niscaya Sa'd bin Mu'adz yang selamat.'"

485.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray while she was lying between him and the qiblah — and she was menstruating.
485.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat sementara ia berbaring di antara beliau dan arah kiblat — dan ia sedang haid.

486.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The family of Muhammad ﷺ never had their fill of barley bread for two consecutive days until the Messenger of Allah ﷺ died."
486.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Keluarga Muhammad ﷺ tidak pernah kenyang dengan roti gandum selama dua hari berturut-turut hingga Rasulullah ﷺ wafat."

487.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to kiss the faces of his wives while he was fasting.
487.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mencium wajah istri-istrinya dalam keadaan berpuasa.

488.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "One who is proficient in reciting the Quran will be with the noble and righteous scribes. And the one who recites the Quran and struggles with it, faltering through it, will have two rewards."
488.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Orang yang mahir membaca Al-Quran akan bersama para utusan yang mulia dan berbakti. Dan orang yang membaca Al-Quran dengan susah payah, terbata-bata di dalamnya, akan mendapat dua pahala."

489.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to kiss while fasting. And which of you has greater control over his desires than the Messenger of Allah ﷺ?"
489.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mencium dalam keadaan berpuasa. Dan siapa di antara kalian yang lebih mampu mengendalikan nafsunya daripada Rasulullah ﷺ?"

490.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked about the night prayer of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, and she said: "He used to pray standing for a long part of the night, and for another long part while seated. When he recited while standing, he would bow while standing; and when he recited while sitting, he would bow while sitting."
490.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya tentang shalat malam Rasulullah ﷺ, dan ia berkata: "Beliau biasa shalat berdiri dalam waktu yang lama di malam hari, dan dalam waktu yang lama lainnya dalam keadaan duduk. Ketika beliau membaca dalam keadaan berdiri, beliau ruku dalam keadaan berdiri; dan ketika membaca dalam keadaan duduk, beliau ruku dalam keadaan duduk."

491.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when a solar eclipse occurred and the call was made, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ stood and led a long prayer, reciting — she believed — Surah Al-Baqarah. Then he bowed for a long time, then said "Sami' Allahu liman hamidah" and stood as long as he had before without prostrating. Then he bowed and prostrated, then stood and did the same again, completing two rak'ahs with four bowings and four prostrations, until the sun reappeared.
491.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika terjadi gerhana matahari dan adzan dikumandangkan, Rasulullah ﷺ berdiri dan shalat panjang, membaca — ia mengira — Surah Al-Baqarah. Kemudian beliau ruku lama, lalu mengucapkan 'Sami' Allahu liman hamidah' dan berdiri selama sebelumnya tanpa sujud. Kemudian beliau ruku dan sujud, lalu berdiri dan melakukan hal yang sama lagi, menyelesaikan dua rakaat dengan empat kali ruku dan empat kali sujud, hingga matahari muncul kembali.

492.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade making nabidh in al-dubba', al-hantam, and al-muzaffat."
492.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ melarang membuat nabidh dalam al-dubba', al-hantam, dan al-muzaffat."

493.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I applied perfume to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ for his ihram when he entered it, and for his exiting of ihram in Mina before he performed the tawaf of ifadah."
493.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku memakaikan wewangian kepada Rasulullah ﷺ untuk ihramnya ketika beliau mengenakannya, dan untuk keluarnya dari ihram di Mina sebelum beliau melakukan tawaf ifadah."

494.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Sawdah, who was a stout and heavy woman, had been permitted by the Messenger of Allah ﷺ to depart from Muzdalifah before the crowds of people arrived.
494.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Saudah, yang merupakan wanita bertubuh besar dan berat, telah mendapat izin dari Rasulullah ﷺ untuk bertolak dari Muzdalifah sebelum kerumunan orang-orang tiba.

495.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when she became menstruating and was worried they would be delayed, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ asked: "Had she not already performed the tawaf of ifadah?" When told yes, he said: "Then there is no delay for you. Depart."
495.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ia haid dan khawatir mereka akan tertunda, Rasulullah ﷺ bertanya: "Bukankah ia sudah melakukan tawaf ifadah?" Ketika diberitahu ya, beliau berkata: "Kalau begitu tidak ada yang menahan kalian. Berangkatlah."

496.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to pray while wearing a striped garment, with part of it on himself and part of it on her — and these striped garments were a type of black woolen cloak.
496.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa shalat mengenakan kain bergaris, sebagiannya di badannya dan sebagiannya di badannya — dan kain bergaris ini adalah sejenis jubah wol hitam.

497.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when asked about nabidh made in earthenware jars, she said: "Is one of you incapable of making a waterskin from her sacrificial animal?" She then said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade — or prevented — nabidh in earthenware jars, and in other vessels."
497.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ditanya tentang nabidh yang dibuat dalam kendi tanah liat, ia berkata: "Apakah salah seorang dari kalian tidak mampu membuat kantung air dari hewan kurbannya?" Ia kemudian berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ melarang — atau mencegah — nabidh dalam kendi tanah liat, dan dalam wadah-wadah lainnya."

498.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "The most complete of the believers in faith are those with the best character, and the most gentle of them toward their families."
498.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Orang beriman yang paling sempurna imannya adalah yang paling baik akhlaknya, dan yang paling lembut di antara mereka kepada keluarganya."

499.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said to Abd al-Rahman ibn Abi Bakr: "Perform the ablution thoroughly, for I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'Woe to the heels from the Fire.'"
499.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata kepada Abdurrahman bin Abi Bakar: "Sempurnakanlah wudhumu, karena aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Celaka bagi tumit-tumit dari api neraka.'"

500.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when she was told why she took on debts, she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'There is no servant who intends to repay his debt except that Allah the Almighty will help him.' So I seek that help."
500.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ditanya mengapa ia berutang, ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak ada seorang hamba yang berniat melunasi utangnya kecuali Allah Yang Maha Mulia akan menolongnya.' Maka aku mencari pertolongan itu."
